name: Parse Items too..!
description: Create List of items and spells from 5etools data of books that you own similar to the Bestiary in Fantasy Statblocks. Data needs to be extracted with ttrpg-convert-cli by Erin Schnabel (https://github.com/ebullient) with custom templates: images-monster2md_custom.txt, images-spell2md_custom.txt and images-item2md-custom.txt (available at https://github.com/estebanwaseaten/obsidian-parse-items-too)
author: Daniel Wegkamp
